items.title: Lumbard Kellner Loads Up UiPath With 224,000 Shares Bought
items.description: UiPath delivers automation software and AI-driven solutions to enterprise clients across banking, healthcare, and government sectors.

items.title: Goldman Sachs Backs AI And Bitcoin ETFs While Valuation Looks Stretched
items.description: Goldman Sachs Group (NYSE:GS) led a US$75 million funding round for Fieldguide, an AI-native audit and advisory platform focused on automating professional services workflows. The bank is also reported to hold a sizable position in Bitcoin-focused ETFs, described as larger than that of other major U.S. banks. For you as an investor, these moves point to where Goldman Sachs is putting time and capital right now, both in AI for professional services and in digital asset infrastructure...

items.title: Goldman Sachs Highlights Improving Occupancy and Cash Flow Visibility at Healthpeak Properties Inc. (DOC)
items.description: Healthpeak Properties Inc. (NYSE:DOC) is included among 10 Best Monthly Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. On January 9, Goldman Sachs started coverage of Healthpeak Properties Inc.
